metadata.title: Chevrolet & Car Events - Midwest Region (Apr 2026 - Apr 2027)
metadata.notes: Some recurring events have estimated dates based on historical patterns. Verify dates closer to event.

events.name: 76th Illinois Secretary of State Vehicle Show
events.description: Annual vehicle show featuring a limited-edition specialty license plate of the 1957 Chevrolet Bel Air for 2026. Open to all makes but Chevy-themed plate commemorates the year.

events.name: Ed Morse Chevrolet Car Show
events.description: Chevrolet dealership-hosted car show.

events.name: Street Machine Nationals - Du Quoin
events.description: National event for hot rods, muscle cars, street machines and street trucks. Show-N-Shine contest, Performance Marketplace, and racing events. Thousands of vehicles.

events.name: Route 66 NHRA Nationals
events.description: 26th annual NHRA Mission Foods Drag Racing Series national event. Top Fuel, Funny Car, Pro Stock competition.

events.name: Cary Cruise Nights
events.description: Weekly Wednesday evening cruise nights with themed displays, music, and family-friendly activities. No cost, no preregistration required.

events.name: Delaney Chevrolet Car Show
events.description: Chevrolet dealership car show with classic cars, food trucks, and pin up contest. Note: This is Indiana, Pennsylvania - not the state of Indiana.

events.name: 20th Century Chevy Car Fest
events.description: All-Chevy event with 600+ antique and custom cars, Saturday cruise through downtown Washington streets. One of the largest Chevy-specific events in Indiana.

events.name: 67th Indianapolis World of Wheels
events.description: Major indoor custom car show featuring hot rods, custom cars, trucks & motorcycles. One of the largest auto events in Indiana.

events.name: Bowtie Nationals - Indianapolis Raceway Park
events.type: drag racing / car show / swap meet
events.description: All-Chevrolet event: drag racing, autocross, car show, swap meet, dyno challenge, burnout contest, vendor midway. Chevrolet-bodied vehicles only (Camaro, Chevelle, Corvette, Nova, C10, etc.).

events.name: NHRA U.S. Nationals
events.description: The biggest and most prestigious drag race in the world. Labor Day weekend tradition. NHRA's 75th anniversary season.

events.name: Goodguys 35th Speedway Motors Heartland Nationals
events.description: 5,000+ specialty vehicles, July 4th weekend festivities, fireworks Saturday night. One of the largest car shows in the Midwest.

events.name: Ed Morse Chevy GMC Car Show
events.description: Chevrolet/GMC dealership-hosted car show.

events.name: Top of Iowa Car Show
events.description: Annual car show held the 4th Sunday of July. All makes welcome.

events.name: Albaugh Classic Car Show presented by Karl Chevrolet

location.venue: The District at Prairie Trail, 1500 SW Main St

events.description: Central Iowa's favorite car show presented by Karl Chevrolet. Features Dennis Albaugh's legendary Chevy convertible collection alongside hundreds of show cars.

events.name: 39th Annual Midwest Chevelle Regionals
events.description: Longest running Chevelle Show in the USA. Chevelles, Malibus, El Caminos, Wagons, GMC Sprints & Beaumonts. Hosted by Wichita Area Chevelle Owners.

events.name: Kansas City Auto Show
events.description: Major auto show featuring new vehicles from all manufacturers including Chevrolet.

events.name: 66th Annual World of Wheels Kansas City

location.venue: Kansas City Convention Center, 301 W. 13th St

events.description: Hot rods, custom cars, trucks & motorcycles showcase. One of the premier indoor car shows in the region.

events.name: Haulin' Oz - Kansas All-GM Truck Show
events.description: Kansas' largest all-GM truck show including Chevy, GMC, and other GM trucks.

events.name: 8th Annual Shaheen Chevrolet Car Show
events.description: Annual Chevrolet dealership car show at Shaheen Chevrolet.

events.name: 45th Annual All-Chevy Show (Steeltown Corvette Club)
events.description: Long-running all-Chevrolet car show. Registration forms available on their website.

events.name: Corvettes America 25th Anniversary Show

location.venue: Everest Collegiate High School, 5935 Clarkston Rd

events.description: Midwest's newest all-Corvette show. 25th anniversary celebration combining show cars, Corvette suppliers, and display cars.

events.name: NHRA Michigan Nationals
events.description: NHRA Mission Foods national event at U.S. 131 Motorsports Park.

events.name: MSRA Back to the 50's Weekend
events.description: 52nd annual event. 11,000+ street rods, customs, classics (1964 and earlier). $15 admission (cash only). Largest event of its kind in the Midwest.

events.name: Cars and Caves - American Theme
events.description: American vehicles theme (Ford, Mopar, GM/Chevy, Pontiac). Monthly shows last Saturday April-September, 9am-1pm.

events.name: Chevrolet Booth at Minnesota State Fair
events.description: Chevrolet booth featuring brand vehicles, t-shirts and tote bags.

events.name: Friendly Chevrolet Fridley 49er Days Benefit Show
events.description: MSMA benefit show at Friendly Chevrolet dealership, 5pm-8pm.

events.name: Classic Car Show at Kolacky Days
events.description: 2026 featured model: Chevrolet Impala SS 1961-1969.

events.name: All Chevy Show at National Museum of Transportation
events.description: Fabulous Fifties Car Club All Chevy Show, 9am-12pm. All Chevrolet vehicles on display at historic transportation museum.

events.name: The Great Car Show - Kansas City Auto Museum

location.venue: National WWI Museum and Memorial backdrop

events.description: Annual fundraiser for Kansas City Automotive Museum.

events.name: 71st Omaha World of Wheels
events.description: America's Finest Hot Rods, Custom Cars, Trucks & Motorcycles.

events.name: High Plains Auto Club Rock 'N Roll Father's Day Classic
events.description: 27th annual show. Classic cars, hot rods, and rock 'n roll.

events.name: Nebraska Brewing Company Car Shows
events.description: Monthly car shows at brewery, 2nd Saturday April through October.

events.name: City Museum Car Show
events.description: Annual car show from 9am-4pm.

events.name: 66th Annual Topper's Car Show
events.description: Sat 9am-7pm, Sun 9am-5pm. $20 tickets. All profits to local charities.

events.name: New Town Chamber Car & Motorcycle Show
events.description: Car and motorcycle show, 3pm-7pm.

events.name: Rods N Rock Annual Classic Car Show
events.description: Classic car show during Grant County Fair, 9am-3pm MT.

events.name: Annual Berea All-Chevy Show
events.description: All-Chevrolet show: Corvettes, Camaros, Bel-Airs, Blazers - if it has a bowtie, it's welcome.

events.name: Goodguys 28th Summit Racing Nationals
events.description: Goodguys' 'Big One.' Grand Prize '40 Ford Coupe giveaway. Top 12 of the Year awards. America's Favorite Car Show.

events.name: Summit Racing Equipment NHRA Nationals
events.description: 20th annual event. NHRA's 75th anniversary season. Top Fuel, Funny Car, Pro Stock, Pro Mod.

events.name: 49th Annual Cornwell Tools Night Under Fire
events.description: Largest single-day drag race in the world. New King Of Nitro Top Fuel vs Funny Car format. Fireworks, live concert.

events.name: Bowtie Nationals - Summit Motorsports Park
events.type: drag racing / car show / swap meet
events.description: Chevrolet Performance Bowtie Nationals featuring GM Invasion. All-Chevy drag racing, autocross, car show, swap meet, dyno challenge, burnout contest.

events.name: Oktoberfest Car & Motorcycle Show
events.description: Car and motorcycle show in downtown Willoughby.

events.name: 35th Annual Ames Performance Pontiac Nationals
events.description: GM-related: Pontiac-specific but part of the GM family. Drag racing and car show.

events.name: Oklahoma High Performance Racing Swap Meet
events.description: Racing auction, trade show & swap meet.

events.name: Tulsa High Performance Racing Swap Meet
events.description: Racing auction, trade show & swap meet.

events.name: 62nd Annual Darryl Starbird Rod & Custom Car Show
events.description: Legendary rod & custom car show. Rockin' Billy Bash with pinstripers, tattoo artists, rock n' roll. Fri 12-10pm, Sat 10-10pm, Sun 10-6pm.

events.name: Almost Ready to Cruise Car Club Swap Meet
events.description: Fri 8am-6pm, Sat 8am-4pm.

events.name: Duncan Auto Swap Meet
events.description: Three-day indoor/outdoor automotive swap meet & car show. Muscle cars, classic vehicles, restoration parts, collectibles.

events.name: Tulsa Swap Meet
events.description: 900+ automotive vendor spaces, motorcycle swap meet, car corral & RV spaces. Free admission and parking. 8am-5pm rain or shine.

events.name: Route 66 Capital Cruise
events.description: World-record classic car parade, food trucks, live music, and vendors along Route 66.

events.name: OKC Auto Show
events.description: New car auto show during the Oklahoma State Fair.

events.name: Topper's Winter Car Show
events.description: Classic and custom cars, valve cover racing competitions.

events.name: Cruiser Car Show & Street Fair
events.description: July 4th car show and street fair in downtown Rapid City.

events.name: 44th Annual Black Hills Super Swap Meet & Car Corral
events.description: Long-running automotive swap meet and car corral.

events.name: 43rd Annual People's Choice All-Corvette Show
events.description: All-Corvette show at Heiser Chevrolet dealership. $20 registration fee.

events.name: Iola Car Show & Swap Meet
events.description: America's Car Show & Swap Meet. 4,000 swap spaces, 2,400 show cars, 1,600 camping sites, 400 car corral spaces. One of the largest in the country.

events.name: WCEC Season Opener Car Showcase & Meet
events.description: Wisconsin's largest car show. Skid pad, field concours, product giveaways. 1,300 asphalt stalls.

events.name: 46th Eagle River Car and Truck Show
events.description: Annual car and truck show in northern Wisconsin.

events.name: Bowtie Nationals - Beech Bend Raceway

location.venue: Beech Bend Raceway Park, 798 Beech Bend Rd

events.type: drag racing / car show / swap meet
events.description: NOTE: Kentucky (not Midwest) but close to OH/IN border and major Chevy event. All-Chevy drag racing, autocross, car show, swap meet, dyno challenge, burnout contest. Chevrolet-bodied vehicles only.

events.name: Carlisle GM Nationals
events.description: NOTE: Pennsylvania but premier GM event. 1,000+ GM vehicles. 2026 features C10 & Square Body Chevy Special Feature, 100th Pontiac celebration. Automotive flea market & car corral. Rolling burnout & donut contest.

sources.name: CarShowNationals.com
sources.description: State-by-state car show listings for all 50 states. Updated regularly.

sources.name: CarCruiseFinder.com
sources.description: Daily-updated car show and cruise night listings by state and city.

sources.name: OldRide.com Events
sources.description: Classic car & truck shows, auctions, swap meets, motorcycle shows by state.

sources.name: DriveChicago.com Car Shows
sources.description: Comprehensive listing of Chicago-area car shows and cruise nights.

sources.name: Wisconsin Motor Events
sources.description: Most complete calendar of Wisconsin car shows, cruise nights, swap meets, and races.

sources.name: Minnesota Street Machine Association (MSMA)
sources.description: 2026 car show events calendar for Minnesota.

sources.name: Route 66 Cruisers Oklahoma
sources.description: Free listing of Oklahoma car shows, swap meets, cruise nights.

sources.name: OklahomaCarShows.com
sources.description: Comprehensive Oklahoma car show listings.

sources.name: GetOutGarage.com
sources.description: Car show listings by state with 47+ shows across Iowa alone.

sources.name: Octane Road - Iowa Car Show Calendar
sources.description: Iowa-specific car show calendar.

sources.name: Goodguys Rod & Custom Association
sources.description: National event organizer with major Midwest shows in Des Moines and Columbus.

sources.name: NHRA Schedule
sources.description: Official NHRA national event schedule including all Midwest drag racing events.

sources.name: Summit Motorsports Park
sources.description: Full season schedule for Norwalk, OH drag racing venue.

sources.name: Bowtie Nationals
sources.description: All-Chevrolet drag racing and car show events at multiple venues (Indianapolis, Norwalk, Beech Bend).

sources.name: Autorama / World of Wheels
sources.description: Indoor custom car show circuit with events in Omaha, Kansas City, Indianapolis.

sources.name: Vette-Vues Corvette Calendar
sources.description: Extensive list of Corvette-specific events nationwide.

sources.name: 3D Sound - Dixon IL Car Show Calendar
sources.description: Northern Illinois and surrounding area car show calendar.

sources.name: Cruis'n Media
sources.description: Michigan and Midwest cruise-in and car show event calendar.

sources.name: South Dakota Car Shows (Facebook)
sources.description: Community-run South Dakota car show listings.

sources.name: Car Show Calendar North Dakota (Facebook Group)
sources.description: Community-run North Dakota car show calendar.
